description: Path-confusion cache deception (Akamai 2024) — semicolon, encoded-slash, fragment reflection variants

semicolon_path_param.description: URL with ;static.css after dynamic path — CDN caches as static, origin treats as dynamic

probes.description: If origin serves /profile/me content AND CDN caches it as .css → cache deception

encoded_slash_split.description: URL-encoded slash splits routing between CDN and origin

probes.description: Encoded slash interpreted differently by CDN vs origin
